              <frame id="1:7680" name="Container" x="0" y="0" width="441" height="54">
                <text id="1:7681" name="Master the art of yoga in the air with our Aerial Yoga Teacher Training Course at Bodhi School of Yoga. Build strength, grace, and confidence while learning how to teach this unique and therapeutic style of yoga using hammock." x="0" y="0" width="1273" height="54" />
              </frame>
              <text id="1:7682" name="You'll combine traditional yoga postures with graceful aerial movements — learning how inversions decompress the spine, build core stability, and create a deeply healing experience for your future students." x="0" y="66" width="1274" height="54" />
            </frame>
          </frame>
        </frame>
      </frame>
    </frame>
  </frame>
